canonical_definition: Across the provided literature, RedPajama V2 is consistently characterized as a large-scale, preprocessed web-corpus dataset designed for pretraining language models. It is described as being compiled from "diverse Internet sources" and containing up to "30 trillion tokens" (Programming Every Example: Lifting Pre-training Data Quality Like Experts at Scale). The most prevalent application of RedPajama V2 is as a pretraining set, with one study explicitly noting it is "designed for training language models" in the context of language modeling (No Need to Talk: Asynchronous Mixture of Language Models). Some research utilizes specific subsets of the data, such as the "'sample-100B' subset" for experiments (Improving Pretraining Data Using Perplexity Correlations). Beyond its primary use for pretraining, the dataset also serves other measurement purposes. For instance, one paper uses it as a source of text domains for measuring model losses to inform data selection, while another employs its validation set as a benchmark to measure forgetting by tracking changes in pretraining loss.
papers: Improving Pretraining Data Using Perplexity Correlations
No Need to Talk: Asynchronous Mixture of Language Models
Programming Every Example: Lifting Pre-training Data Quality Like Experts at Scale
Scaling Laws for Forgetting during Finetuning with Pretraining Data Injection
Soup-of-Experts: Pretraining Specialist Models via Parameters Averaging

definitions.text: A web-corpus dataset used as the source of pretraining text domains on which model losses were measured for data selection.
definitions.paper: Improving Pretraining Data Using Perplexity Correlations

definitions.text: A large-scale web-text corpus used to train the language models in the paper.
definitions.paper: No Need to Talk: Asynchronous Mixture of Language Models

definitions.text: A large and diverse corpus (Weber et al., 2024) used for pretraining models, with its validation set also used as a benchmark to measure forgetting by tracking changes in pretraining loss.
definitions.paper: Scaling Laws for Forgetting during Finetuning with Pretraining Data Injection

relationships.paper: No Need to Talk: Asynchronous Mixture of Language Models
relationships.evidence: “We use the RedPajama-V2 dataset (Computer, 2023), which is a large-scale collection of text data designed for training language models.”
